programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: What is red, white and green all over? It's Rachael Ray's lasagne! Rachael shows how to make delicious lasagne by layering sheets of pasta with cime di rapa, ricotta and a ragu sauce.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers
programme.desc: On their final night in Mongolia, the Earth-Cleaning Bros reflect under a sky full of stars - no signal, no power, just nature. But peace turns to panic as temperatures drop to - 10°C.

programme.title: The Killer I Picked Up
programme.desc: When a hardworking single mom starts a side job as a rideshare driver to help pay for her daughter's college tuition, she becomes the unrelenting obsession of a mysterious rider with a dark past.

programme.title: Taken In Plain Sight
programme.desc: After months of investigation, Abby becomes convinced that she's found her daughter's abductor. With the authorities dismissing her as a grief-stricken mother, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Hit-And-Miss Tour
programme.desc: Waking up early one morning, the Dokbakz are all hungry and ready to head out for breakfast. But when they arrive at the restaurant, they are met with an unexpected surprise.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Keisha is apprehensive about the team's next zombie, which may hurt the potential resale. Add to that a bad foundation and the discovery of termites, this potential flip seems more like a potential flop.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: A mystery box challenge with a saucy twist. The cooks must use at least one of six Asian sauces to cook a showstopping dish, with the bottom four headed for tomorrow's pressure test.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Five Willow Fish is a Taiwanese dish that makes great use of the nation's affluent fishery. Chef Long interprets this dish with masterful skills, and Jason creates a dish inspired by Five Willow Fish.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy
programme.sub-title: Baked Gnocchi & Jammy Olive Oil Cake
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Pheasant is a popular type of poultry commonly used in Tuscany. Rachael demonstrates how to cook pheasant in a ragu sauce served over a bed of pappardelle pasta.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Alynne ropes the team into a triplex renovation with her friend Octavian, who is in way over his head. A good deal with huge profit potential quickly turns into a costly venture due to Octavian's ways.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make a hearty beef stew that is both versatile and delicious and serves it with her mother's famous 'pucky huddle' potato fries.

programme.title: Hit-And-Miss Tour
programme.desc: After dinner at the Luang Prabang Bamboo Restaurant, the Dokbakz head back to their accommodation, only to find that the entrance has turned into a flooded mess from the heavy rain.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Romance sparks when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange and his newest run of episodes appear to revolve around her eventual murder.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Alynne ropes the team into a triplex renovation with her friend Octavian, who is in way over his head. A good deal with huge profit potential quickly turns into a costly venture due to Octavian's ways.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make a hearty beef stew that is both versatile and delicious and serves it with her mother's famous 'pucky huddle' potato fries.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy
programme.sub-title: Baked Gnocchi & Jammy Olive Oil Cake
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Pheasant is a popular type of poultry commonly used in Tuscany. Rachael demonstrates how to cook pheasant in a ragu sauce served over a bed of pappardelle pasta.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Braised pork knuckle is an auspicious dish served in weddings, birthday dinners, and Lunar New Years. Chef Garrison Cheng, makes a twist on classic pork knuckle by using braising and frying techniques.

programme.title: Taken In Plain Sight
programme.desc: After months of investigation, Abby becomes convinced that she's found her daughter's abductor. With the authorities dismissing her as a grief-stricken mother, she takes matters into her own hands.

programme.title: The Killer I Picked Up
programme.desc: When a hardworking single mom starts a side job as a rideshare driver to help pay for her daughter's college tuition, she becomes the unrelenting obsession of a mysterious rider with a dark past.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy
programme.sub-title: Baked Gnocchi & Jammy Olive Oil Cake
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Pheasant is a popular type of poultry commonly used in Tuscany. Rachael demonstrates how to cook pheasant in a ragu sauce served over a bed of pappardelle pasta.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to make a marinated vegetable-infused dish of tteokbokki, a popular Korean food made from rice cakes.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: A mystery box challenge with a saucy twist. The cooks must use at least one of six Asian sauces to cook a showstopping dish, with the bottom four headed for tomorrow's pressure test.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Five Willow Fish is a Taiwanese dish that makes great use of the nation's affluent fishery. Chef Long interprets this dish with masterful skills, and Jason creates a dish inspired by Five Willow Fish.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.sub-title: Cheese Fondue With Vegetables, Sausage And Beef Tips
programme.desc: Impress your holiday guests with a classic cheesy fondue party! Rachael shows how to make her version of an easy and decadent 'Fundue' that is sure to bring everyone around to celebrate the holidays.

programme.title: The K-Gim Revolution
programme.desc: From the Korean table to tables around the world, gim is gaining global recognition. What makes gim so compelling? Michelin three-star chef Anh Sung-jae follows the journey of gim as a K-food icon.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Romance sparks when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange and his newest run of episodes appear to revolve around her eventual murder.

programme.title: Single Black Female 3: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: After being wrongfully convicted of murder, Monica has finally been proven innocent. All charges have been dropped and the police have shifted their focus to Simone, their number-one person of interest.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Hit-And-Miss Tour
programme.desc: With high expectations, the Dokbakz arrive in Australia, where nature and art coexist. After landing at Sydney Airport, they are eager to explore one of the city's most famous landmarks: the Opera House.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: Dolmar thinks he hit a homerun with a zombie outside Tampa. As they start to renovate, it's discovered that this house will need a new roof, flooring and an industrial clean-out of the in-ground pool.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: MasterChef legend Daren Purchese returns with his toughest challenge yet. Darren's exquisite Cherry Blossom dessert will push the novice cooks to their limits as they try to replicate it in four hours.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Pantoh is a Taiwanese dining experience where guests enjoy exquisite dishes in open-air venues. Chef Ah-yong showcases an emblematic dish of pantoh cuisine: calamari, sea snail, and leek soup.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy
programme.sub-title: Balsamic & Soy Braised Brisket & Apple Honey Cake
programme.desc: If you're looking for a showstopper dinner-party dish, this is the one. Balsamic and soy-glazed brisket is always a crowd-pleaser. It is fork-tender but with a deep, rich flavour.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael cooks up her family's favourite version of spaghetti and meatballs with a Tuscan flair.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: This lakefront neighborhood zombie seems like a great deal, with its massive swimming pool and vintage floors. But with an unexpected roof replacement, their huge payday may just drown in the deep end.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael teams up with her friend Dr. Will Li, an author and medical scientist whose work focuses on eating for well-being. Together, they prepare a meal of grilled sea bass and sauteed baby bok choy.

programme.title: Hit-And-Miss Tour
programme.desc: Waking up early one morning, the Dokbakz are all hungry and ready to head out for breakfast. But when they arrive at the restaurant, they are met with an unexpected surprise.

programme.title: I Was Octomom: The Natalie Suleman Story
programme.desc: In January 2009, Natalie gave birth to eight babies--the first human to accomplish this miraculous feat. However, instead of being celebrated for a record-breaking event, she faced harsh scrutiny.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: This lakefront neighborhood zombie seems like a great deal, with its massive swimming pool and vintage floors. But with an unexpected roof replacement, their huge payday may just drown in the deep end.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael teams up with her friend Dr. Will Li, an author and medical scientist whose work focuses on eating for well-being. Together, they prepare a meal of grilled sea bass and sauteed baby bok choy.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy
programme.sub-title: Balsamic & Soy Braised Brisket & Apple Honey Cake
programme.desc: If you're looking for a showstopper dinner-party dish, this is the one. Balsamic and soy-glazed brisket is always a crowd-pleaser. It is fork-tender but with a deep, rich flavour.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael cooks up her family's favourite version of spaghetti and meatballs with a Tuscan flair.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Five Willow Fish is a Taiwanese dish that makes great use of the nation's affluent fishery. Chef Long interprets this dish with masterful skills, and Jason creates a dish inspired by Five Willow Fish.

programme.title: Single Black Female 3: The Final Chapter
programme.desc: After being wrongfully convicted of murder, Monica has finally been proven innocent. All charges have been dropped and the police have shifted their focus to Simone, their number-one person of interest.

programme.title: Lonely Crime Fanatic
programme.desc: Romance sparks when a lonely true crime fan meets her favourite podcast host, but things soon turn strange and his newest run of episodes appear to revolve around her eventual murder.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy
programme.sub-title: Balsamic & Soy Braised Brisket & Apple Honey Cake
programme.desc: If you're looking for a showstopper dinner-party dish, this is the one. Balsamic and soy-glazed brisket is always a crowd-pleaser. It is fork-tender but with a deep, rich flavour.

programme.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael cooks up her family's favourite version of spaghetti and meatballs with a Tuscan flair.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programme.desc: Rachael has always dreamed of creating her own line of flavoured popcorn. She incorporates her favourite flavour combinations in a crowd-pleasing recipe for dill popcorn shrimp.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: MasterChef legend Daren Purchese returns with his toughest challenge yet. Darren's exquisite Cherry Blossom dessert will push the novice cooks to their limits as they try to replicate it in four hours.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Pantoh is a Taiwanese dining experience where guests enjoy exquisite dishes in open-air venues. Chef Ah-yong showcases an emblematic dish of pantoh cuisine: calamari, sea snail, and leek soup.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Holidays
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to prepare a meat-free holiday meal that everyone will love! First, she makes a flavourful soup using Italian pumpkins. Next, she prepares her family's traditional 'Holiday Stars'.

programme.title: La French Touch
programme.desc: Sebastien Martin and his friend Chef Francois Audrin travel through Kochi Prefecture, visiting local farms and wineries, discovering inspiration from the producers' commitment and unique food culture.

programme.title: Single Black Female 2: Simone's Revenge
programme.desc: After escaping the murderous clutches of Simone, Monica is making a fresh start as the host of a primetime TV program. Simone, suffering from amnesia, sees Monica on TV, her memories come rushing back.
